grammar.issues: Some sentences in the profile section are long and could be improved with better punctuation or restructuring for easier readability.

tone.description: The tone is professional and matches a technical position; however, the unusual formatting (extra spaces between letters and words) affects the professionalism and readability.

suggestions: Remove the spacing between each letter and word to improve readability and professionalism.
Use consistent formatting for headings and sections to create a cleaner structure (e.g., normal capitalization instead of spaced out letters).
Break up long sentences in the profile section to improve clarity and flow.
Add more detail about the scope or impact of projects where possible (e.g., number of users, technologies leveraged for performance).
Include dates or durations for certifications and education to give more context to the timeline.
Consider adding a brief summary or objective at the top in a concise paragraph form without spacing issues.
Standardize the contact details format for easy copying/verifying.
